author: Nous Research
text:
We have partnered with 
@Xiaomi
 to bring their excellent MiMo V2 Pro model to Hermes Agent via the Nous Portal - completely free to use for the next 2 weeks!

Access now on the latest version of Hermes Agent: 'hermes update'
image_content:
OCR: MIMO V2
NOW FREE IN
NOUS PORTAL
